description: Reviewed bespoke gate failures for fields_missing.php. Matching entries render as [SKIP][fail][reviewed] (informational — same exit semantics as [SKIP][fail]).

backup_tape_log.reason: Monthly grid bespoke UI intentionally omits flattened CRUD list search, sort, and pagination.

checks.note: Table in index.php missing search wiring: GET/search variable, search input, server-side search conditions
Table in index.php missing sort wiring: GET/sort variable, ASC/DESC direction, ORDER BY sort wiring, sortable header indicators (▲/▼ or $nextDir)
Table in index.php missing pagination wiring: itm_resolve_records_per_page(), $perPage, LIMIT/OFFSET paging, page query state, page navigation controls, total row/page count

company_module_access.reason: Admin company × module matrix is not a flattened CRUD list: rows are all registry modules sorted by slug; matrix search is in-memory on slug/name only. Registry flat list (`list_all`) is auxiliary.

checks.note: Table in index.php missing sort wiring: GET/sort variable, ASC/DESC direction, ORDER BY sort wiring, sortable header indicators (▲/▼ or $nextDir)
Table in index.php missing pagination wiring: itm_resolve_records_per_page(), $perPage, LIMIT/OFFSET paging, page query state, page navigation controls, total row/page count
